expected_answer: Under the DPDP Act 2023, in the event of a personal data breach, the data fiduciary must notify the Data Protection Board of India and each affected data principal.
Yes, Aadhaar masking is mandatory under UIDAI guidelines. Fiduciaries must mask the first 8 digits of Aadhaar numbers before storing or sharing files.
Non-compliance with RBI KYC directions can lead to monetary penalties, warnings, or restrictions on business operations as specified under the Banking Regulation Act.
